name: WH-1000XM5
description: Experience unparalleled noise cancellation with the Sony WH-1000XM5. Featuring eight microphones and two processors, these flagship over-ear headphones create an immersive soundscape that blocks out the world. The 30mm drivers deliver rich, detailed audio with deep bass and crystalline highs. An ergonomic headband with ultra-plush ear cushions ensures all-day comfort on long flights or marathon work sessions. Industry-leading 30-hour battery life keeps the music playing, while Speak-to-Chat technology automatically pauses playback when you start talking. Multipoint connection lets you seamlessly switch between two devices. DSEE Extreme upscales compressed audio in real time, restoring nuance to every track. The perfect companion for frequent flyers and remote workers who demand professional-grade sound.

name: QuietComfort 45
description: Bose QuietComfort 45 sets the gold standard for comfortable noise cancellation. Lightweight construction and plush ear cushions make these the headphones you forget you're wearing, even after hours of use. The proprietary Bose acoustic platform balances bass, midrange, and treble for a natural, lifelike listening experience. Quiet Mode engages the world-class ANC that made Bose famous, while Aware Mode lets in just enough ambient sound to stay connected to your surroundings. With 24 hours of wireless battery life and a quick charge feature that delivers 3 hours of playback from just 15 minutes of charging, you'll never be caught without audio. Volume-optimized EQ ensures music sounds great at any level. Foldable design and included carrying case make travel effortless.

name: AirPods Pro 2nd Gen
description: Apple AirPods Pro deliver a magical listening experience for iPhone users. The custom Apple H2 chip powers next-level Active Noise Cancellation and Transparency mode so natural it feels like wearing nothing at all. Adaptive Audio intelligently blends Noise Cancellation and Transparency based on your environment, automatically adjusting as your surroundings change. Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places sound all around you for a truly cinematic experience. The silicone ear tips come in four sizes and create an acoustic seal for deep bass response. Touch controls on the stem let you manage calls, music, and noise settings effortlessly. IPX4 water resistance handles workouts and light rain. Up to 6 hours of listening time, with 30 more from the MagSafe charging case.

name: Galaxy Buds2 Pro
description: Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro redefine premium earbuds with Hi-Fi 24-bit audio and intelligent 3D sound. The compact ergonomic design fits snugly in the ear for extended wear comfort, while IPX7 water resistance means you can take them from the gym to the pool without worry. Intelligent Active Noise Cancellation automatically detects and filters ambient noise, while Voice Detect switches to Ambient Sound mode when you start speaking. The 10mm two-way speaker system delivers powerful bass alongside crisp, detailed highs. Seamlessly switch between Galaxy devices with Auto Switch, and enjoy up to 8 hours of playtime on a single charge with 21 more hours from the case. Samsung 360 Audio with head tracking creates an immersive spatial audio bubble that moves with you.

name: Momentum True Wireless 3
description: Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 3 earbuds are engineered for audiophiles who refuse to compromise on the go. The 7mm drivers tuned by Sennheiser's legendary acoustic engineers deliver breathtaking clarity across the entire frequency spectrum. Adaptive Noise Cancellation with three adjustable levels silences the world on your terms, while Transparent Hearing keeps you aware of critical sounds when needed. The sleek, compact charging case adds 21 extra hours for a total of 28 hours combined battery life. Sound Personalization in the Smart Control app lets you fine-tune your listening experience with a parametric equalizer. Touch controls are precise and customizable. Built for the audiophile commuter, the Momentum TW3 brings studio-quality tuning and premium materials together in an elegantly compact package that punches far above its class.

name: Evolve2 85
description: Jabra Evolve2 85 is the ultimate professional headset engineered for the modern workplace. Featuring 10 microphones with advanced call technology, your voice is captured with crystal clarity no matter the environment. The industry-leading 37-hour battery life means you'll never miss an important call, while the massive 40mm speakers deliver rich, full-bodied sound for both calls and music. Advanced Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation combines feedforward and feedback mics to create a professional focus bubble wherever you work. The flexible, durable headband and leatherette cushions provide all-day ergonomic comfort during back-to-back video calls. Busylight integration signals your availability to colleagues. Works flawlessly with all major UC platforms including Teams, Zoom, and Google Meet. Multipoint connection handles up to three simultaneous Bluetooth devices.

name: Soundcore Life Q35
description: Anker Soundcore Life Q35 delivers premium features at an unbeatable price. LDAC codec support ensures you're receiving Hi-Res wireless audio with three times more data than standard Bluetooth connections. Three levels of adaptive noise cancellation intelligently analyze your environment and filter distractions accordingly, making these ideal for commuting, studying, and open offices. The generous 40mm drivers produce powerful bass and clear vocals balanced by Soundcore's proprietary BassUp technology. An astounding 40-hour battery life with ANC enabled means you'll rarely reach for the charging cable. Foldable ear cups and a padded headband make these comfortable for extended sessions. The companion app unlocks a customizable EQ and detailed ANC controls. For listeners who want audiophile-adjacent performance without the audiophile price tag, the Life Q35 is a revelation.

name: Tune 760NC
description: JBL Tune 760NC brings JBL's iconic Pure Bass Sound to an accessible over-ear package with serious noise-cancelling chops. The 40mm JBL drivers reproduce the punchy, energetic sound signature that has made the brand synonymous with powerful audio. Active Noise Cancellation blocks out distractions, while the Ambient Aware mode keeps you connected to your environment when needed. A staggering 35-hour battery life means the music plays all week on a single charge. The flat-fold design collapses neatly into the included carrying pouch for travel. Multi-point connection allows seamless switching between your phone and laptop. Voice assistant integration works with Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa. Whether you're commuting through a noisy city or grinding through a long workday, the JBL Tune 760NC delivers reliable performance with that unmistakable JBL punch.

name: MOMENTUM 4 Wireless
description: Sennheiser MOMENTUM 4 Wireless sets a new benchmark for premium wireless audio with an extraordinary 60-hour battery life that outlasts any journey. The 42mm transducers are precision-tuned for Sennheiser's signature audiophile sound profile — expansive soundstage, pinpoint imaging, and effortless detail retrieval that rewards attentive listening. Adaptive Noise Cancellation with three modes gives you precise control over your acoustic environment. The sleek, minimalist design pairs vegetable-tanned leather ear cushions with lightweight aluminium accents for a luxurious look and feel. Sound Personalization in the Smart Control app includes a parametric EQ and podcast enhancement mode. Multipoint connection handles two simultaneous Bluetooth 5.2 devices with Qualcomm aptX Adaptive for hi-res wireless streaming. The MOMENTUM 4 is a statement piece for the discerning listener who demands excellence.

name: WF-1000XM5
description: Sony WF-1000XM5 packs Sony's most sophisticated noise cancellation into its smallest, most refined truly wireless earbud. The new 8.4mm driver unit with a carbon-fibre composite diaphragm delivers an astonishingly wide frequency response, reproducing everything from sub-bass rumble to airy high-frequency shimmer. The dual-chip architecture with QN2e and Integrated Processor V2 intelligently analyses ambient sound 8,000 times per second, creating unprecedented noise cancellation. LDAC Hi-Res wireless audio ensures you hear every nuance the artist intended. Multipoint connection and 360 Reality Audio compatibility round out the feature set. IPX4 resistance handles sweat and light rain. The redesigned case is 25% smaller than its predecessor, slipping effortlessly into any pocket. At 8 hours per charge with an additional 16 from the case, your audio never stops.

name: FreeBuds Pro 3
description: Huawei FreeBuds Pro 3 combine cutting-edge audio engineering with intelligent noise cancellation in a sleek, premium package. The dual driver system pairs an 11mm planar magnetic driver with a dynamic driver, reproducing Hi-Res Audio with extraordinary clarity and depth. Intelligent Dynamic ANC 2.0 adapts in real time to your environment, detecting and eliminating noise from traffic, offices, and public transport simultaneously. The ergonomic open-fit design allows natural ear anatomy to guide a comfortable, secure fit without fatigue. Advanced Call Noise Cancellation with a three-microphone array ensures your voice cuts through clearly in any setting. Huawei Music app integration unlocks a powerful equalizer and spatial audio modes. Multi-device connection and rapid wireless charging on a Qi pad make these earbuds as convenient as they are capable.

name: Jabra Elite 10
description: Jabra Elite 10 earbuds redefine comfort and audio performance with their open-fit ComfortFit design. Unlike traditional in-ear tips that create pressure and fatigue, the Elite 10's unique geometry cradles the outer ear naturally, enabling all-day wear without discomfort. The 10mm Jabra-tuned speaker delivers rich, balanced audio backed by Dolby Audio spatial sound. Advanced Hybrid ANC with six microphones produces exceptional noise isolation in any environment. MultiSensor Voice technology combines three microphones and a bone-conduction sensor to deliver clear, natural-sounding calls even in wind and crowd noise. MySound personalizes audio to your unique hearing profile for a tailor-made listening experience. IP57-rated water and dust resistance makes these earbuds ready for any adventure. Up to 6 hours per bud, plus 21 hours from the case.

name: Soundcore Liberty 4 NC
description: Anker Soundcore Liberty 4 NC delivers flagship-level noise cancellation at a fraction of the premium price. The 98.5% noise reduction rating covers a wider frequency range than most competing earbuds at twice the price, creating a truly peaceful listening environment. The 11mm drivers reproduce LDAC Hi-Res audio with stunning detail and warmth, while custom-tuned bass ensures your favourite tracks hit hard. Adaptive ANC automatically adjusts based on your activities, whether you're running, commuting, or concentrating at a desk. Heart rate monitoring integration tracks your fitness directly through the earbuds during exercise. An impressive 9-hour battery life per charge, with 41 hours total from the wireless charging case. The Soundcore app offers an exceptional 22-band equalizer alongside AI-powered hearing tests that personalise audio to your unique hearing profile.

name: Tune Buds
description: JBL Tune Buds bring JBL's legendary Pure Bass Sound into an affordable truly wireless package that doesn't compromise on the essentials. Active Noise Cancellation silences commute noise effectively, while Ambient Aware mode keeps you connected to your surroundings when safety matters. The 10mm JBL drivers produce punchy, energetic sound with the deep bass response the brand is famous for. Four ear tip sizes ensure a comfortable, sealed fit for maximum sound isolation and bass extension. Up to 8 hours per charge with an additional 32 hours from the compact charging case makes battery anxiety a thing of the past. Fast Pair connects instantly to Android devices, and Voice Assistant compatibility works with Google and Alexa. IPX4 rated for sweat and splash resistance during workouts. For first-time true wireless buyers, Tune Buds is the smart choice.

name: WH-CH720N
description: Sony WH-CH720N proves that world-class noise cancellation doesn't have to cost a fortune. At just 192 grams, these are among the lightest noise-cancelling headphones ever made, making them ideal for long journeys where comfort is paramount. Sony's Integrated Processor V1 delivers surprisingly effective ANC that punches well above its price point, while 360 Reality Audio creates an immersive spatial audio experience. The 30mm drivers deliver Sony's signature balanced sound with surprising bass extension for their compact size. Quick Attention mode lets you hear your environment instantly by cupping the ear. Multipoint connection handles two devices simultaneously, and Google Fast Pair gets you connected in seconds. An exceptional 35-hour battery life and quick-charge capability that provides 60 minutes of play from 3 minutes of charging make the CH720N a genuinely compelling value proposition.

name: QuietComfort Earbuds II
description: Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II set the world record for noise cancellation in a truly wireless earbud, using PersonalisedQuiet Calibration to customise the ANC to the unique shape of your ears. The custom-designed acoustic system produces the full, natural Bose sound with clear highs and deep, powerful bass. CustomTune technology analyses your ear canal in less than a second to optimise both the sound quality and the noise cancellation simultaneously. The StayHear Max ear tip design creates a secure, comfortable fit that won't shift during your commute. Aware Mode with ActiveSense dynamically adjusts how much environmental sound enters, preventing sudden loud noises from startling you. Six hours of listening time per charge, with an additional 12 from the case. The Bose Music app gives full control over all settings.

name: HD 660S2
description: Sennheiser HD 660S2 represents the pinnacle of open-back audiophile headphone design, refined over decades of acoustic research. The new 38mm transducers with a reinforced titanium coating offer a breathtakingly low distortion profile, revealing subtle details in recordings that other headphones simply cannot reproduce. The open-back design creates a vast, airy soundstage with precise stereo imaging that makes recordings sound three-dimensional and alive. Low impedance of 150 ohms pairs well with portable DACs and amplifiers while remaining easy to drive from most desktop equipment. The replaceable cable system terminates in a balanced 4.4mm plug with a 6.35mm adapter included. Premium velour ear cushions provide exceptional breathability during extended studio sessions. For the serious audiophile seeking reference-grade monitoring, mixing, or pure musical enjoyment, the HD 660S2 is a landmark achievement.

name: Pixel Buds Pro
description: Google Pixel Buds Pro seamlessly integrate into the Google ecosystem with best-in-class features powered by Google's custom audio chip. Silent Seal uses real-time internal microphone feedback to continuously adapt active noise cancellation for a custom acoustic seal in your ear. The 11mm speaker driver delivers well-balanced sound with clear mids and satisfying low-end response, backed by six-channel audio processing. Spatial Audio with head tracking creates an immersive surround sound experience for supported content. Google Assistant integration is the deepest in any earbud, providing instant translation, real-time captions, and hands-free smart home control. Multipoint connection lets you move effortlessly between Pixel phones, Chromebooks, and other devices. Up to 7 hours listening time with ANC enabled, and 20 more from the wireless charging case.

name: Fidelio X3
description: Philips Fidelio X3 headphones deliver exceptional open-back audio performance with massive 50mm drivers that produce a room-filling soundstage. The ring magnet transducer system offers extremely low harmonic distortion for a clean, accurate sound reproduction across the entire frequency range. A breathable double-layered fabric headband provides a secure fit while promoting airflow, making extended listening sessions comfortable even in warm environments. The open acoustic design breathes naturally, eliminating the pressure that closed headphones create while generating a wide, spacious soundscape. Detachable OFC cables terminate in a high-quality 3.5mm connector with a 6.35mm adaptor. Velour-covered ear cushions are generously padded and fully replaceable. Whether for critical studio monitoring, gaming, or simply enjoying music at home, the Fidelio X3 rewards attentive listening with layers of detail.

name: Elite Active 75t
description: Jabra Elite Active 75t is purpose-built for athletes who demand reliability and performance during their toughest training sessions. The IP57 rating provides complete dust resistance and full waterproof protection, meaning you can wear these in a downpour, at the pool, or through the sweatiest workout without hesitation. The compact 6mm driver is tuned specifically for the elevated heart rates and physical movement of exercise, delivering energetic sound that keeps your motivation high. The secure angled fit stays firmly in place during high-intensity activities including running, HIIT, and cycling. Customizable ANC or HearThrough mode lets you choose whether to zone in or stay aware of your environment. MySound hearing profile personalisation optimises audio specifically for you. 7.5 hours battery per charge, 28 hours total. Jabra's renowned call quality ensures clear communication post-workout.

name: Cloud Alpha Wireless
description: HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless shatters battery life expectations with an extraordinary 300-hour runtime on a single charge — enough to game all month without reaching for a cable. The 50mm dual-chamber driver design physically separates bass and midrange frequencies, reducing distortion and delivering a clean, detailed audio profile that lets you hear every footstep and environmental audio cue in your games. The plush memory foam ear cushions wrapped in premium leatherette provide exceptional comfort during extended sessions. The directional soundstage aids competitive gaming, while immersive separation benefits cinematic single-player experiences equally. The detachable noise-cancelling microphone picks up clear voice chat while filtering keyboard and background noise. Multi-platform compatibility covers PC, PS5, and PS4 via the included USB wireless dongle. The solid aluminium frame ensures durability without adding unnecessary weight.

name: BlackShark V2 Pro
description: Razer BlackShark V2 Pro is the wireless gaming headset trusted by esports professionals worldwide. Triforce Titanium 50mm drivers split the audio spectrum into three distinct frequency zones, delivering precise positional accuracy for competitive titles where hearing an opponent before you see them can mean the difference between winning and losing. THX Spatial Audio creates a convincing 360-degree soundscape for both competitive and immersive gaming. The ultra-soft memory foam ear cushions wrapped in breathable mesh reduce heat buildup during marathon sessions. The HyperClear Supercardioid microphone uses beam-forming technology to isolate your voice from background noise. An impressive 70-hour battery life via 2.4GHz low-latency wireless connection ensures you never lose connection mid-game. A durable steel headband with plush leatherette headband padding completes the professional package.

name: MDR-7506
description: Sony MDR-7506 has been the industry standard for studio monitoring for over three decades, trusted by broadcasters, recording engineers, and musicians worldwide. The 40mm neodymium drivers deliver a clean, flat response optimised for professional monitoring tasks, revealing mix imperfections that consumer headphones would mask. Closed-back circumaural design provides excellent passive isolation during tracking and recording sessions in the studio. The coiled cable is resistant to tangles and offers natural strain relief during extended use. At just 230 grams, these headphones provide fatigue-free comfort during long editing and mixing sessions. Collapsible design allows single-ear monitoring when needed, and the folding mechanism makes storage and transport effortless. The legendary reliability of the MDR-7506 means your pair could still be in service 20 years from now, as countless professional pairs already are.

name: PXC 550-II
description: Sennheiser PXC 550-II delivers business-class audio performance in an elegant, compact headphone designed for the professional traveller. The flat-fold design with carrying case makes it one of the most portable over-ear noise-cancelling headphones available. NoiseGard Adaptive ANC continuously analyses your acoustic environment and adjusts cancellation depth accordingly, providing optimal isolation whether you're at 35,000 feet or in an open-plan office. Sennheiser's precision 38mm transducers deliver the neutral, accurate sound reproduction that professionals rely on for critical listening. The touch panel controls on the ear cup allow intuitive gesture-based control of music and calls. TalkThrough mode lets you engage in brief conversations without removing the headphones. Voice Assistant integration with Google and Alexa. Twenty hours of battery life on a single charge with a folding, rechargeable design that travels as beautifully as it sounds.

name: Soundcore Space Q45
description: Anker Soundcore Space Q45 delivers remarkable value with a premium feature set at an accessible price point. Adaptive ANC 2.0 monitors your environment 1,000 times per second, adjusting noise reduction dynamically to provide optimal performance whether you're in a loud café or a quiet library. Hi-Res Audio certification and LDAC support mean you're receiving high-quality wireless audio that reveals details in your music typically reserved for premium headphones costing three times as much. The 40mm drivers are carefully tuned for balanced, musical playback with clear vocals and satisfying bass. An extraordinary 50-hour battery life with ANC enabled outlasts any trip. The foldable design and premium carrying case make travel effortless. The Soundcore app includes a fully customisable equalizer and listening mode controls. A genuine alternative to flagship headphones for the value-conscious audiophile.

name: T560BT
description: Sennheiser T560BT delivers the signature Sennheiser sound in a lightweight on-ear form factor designed for daily urban use. The 32mm drivers reproduce Sennheiser's characteristically balanced, accurate sound with surprising depth for a compact on-ear design. The slim, foldable design collapses to fit in any bag or jacket pocket, making it the perfect companion for commuters and students. Bluetooth 5.0 with multipoint connection lets you pair to two devices simultaneously, switching between your phone and laptop effortlessly. The intuitive button controls and built-in microphone ensure clear calls wherever you are. At just 120 grams, these headphones are featherlight on your head during long commutes. An impressive 40-hour battery life means a week's worth of commuting on a single charge. Voice Assistant support and USB-C charging round out a compelling package at a genuinely affordable price.

name: True Wireless X
description: 1More True Wireless X earbuds offer an exceptional balance of sound quality, comfort, and durability at an approachable price. The 10mm composite mesh diaphragm driver reproduces a vivid sound with punchy bass and clear, detailed highs that rival earbuds at double the price. The ergonomic semi-in-ear design provides a comfortable, secure fit for active use without the discomfort of deep insertion tips. IPX5 splash resistance handles sweat-drenched workouts and outdoor adventures with ease. A 35ms ultra-low latency mode minimises audio delay for gaming and video content. The four-microphone call system produces clear, natural voice quality. Seven hours per charge with 28 hours from the wireless charging case. Google Fast Pair and Microsoft Swift Pair allow near-instant pairing on compatible Android and Windows devices. A reliable everyday companion that delivers genuine value.

name: Arctis Nova Pro Wireless
description: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless is the most advanced gaming headset ever created, featuring a dual-wireless system that supports simultaneous 2.4GHz and Bluetooth connections for flawless platform versatility. The hot-swappable dual battery system with a charging dock means your headset never runs out of power — swap batteries to instantly resume play. Retractable Hi-Res Noise-Cancelling microphone with an Infinity ClaryFi AI-powered noise removal algorithm produces broadcast-quality voice chat. The premium 40mm neodymium drivers with active noise cancellation deliver crisp competitive audio and rich cinematic sound. The GameDAC Gen 2 offers parametric EQ with 36dB gain per band for unprecedented audio customisation. A luxurious ski goggle suspension headband distributes weight evenly, making 12-hour sessions feel effortless. Compatible with PC, PS5, PS4, Switch, and all Bluetooth devices simultaneously.

name: EarFun Air Pro 3
description: EarFun Air Pro 3 provides remarkable noise cancellation and audio quality that punches well above its modest price tag. Qualcomm QCC3071 chip enables LDAC Hi-Res wireless audio alongside multipoint connection that handles two simultaneous Bluetooth 5.3 devices. The six-microphone array with cVc 8.0 algorithm produces clear, professional voice quality for calls and video meetings. Adaptive ANC with four adjustable levels provides up to 43dB of noise reduction, rivalling earbuds costing three times as much. The 10mm composite dynamic driver delivers a balanced, engaging sound with natural bass extension. IPX5 water resistance provides workout durability. An impressive 9 hours per charge with 45 hours total from the wireless charging case makes these exceptional value. A transparent case lid lets you check bud placement at a glance. For anyone seeking premium features without the premium price, EarFun Air Pro 3 is a serious contender.

name: Powerbeats Pro
description: Beats Powerbeats Pro is the definitive workout earbud for serious athletes who demand professional performance. The adjustable ear hooks create an absolutely secure, locked-in fit that withstands even the most explosive movements — sprinting, box jumps, and kettlebell swings alike. The Apple H1 chip delivers instant pairing with Apple devices, seamless automatic switching between iPhone, iPad, and Apple Watch, and hands-free Siri access. The 9.5mm driver is tuned by Beats to deliver powerful, bass-forward sound that pushes you through every rep. IPX4 sweat resistance means these earbuds can handle whatever you throw at them. Up to 9 hours per earbud — longer than most workout earbuds with ANC — means you'll get through your entire training day. Volume and track controls on each earbud ensure full control without reaching for your phone. The professional choice.

name: Fit Pro
description: Beats Fit Pro earbuds are engineered for movement without compromise, combining Apple-quality ANC with workout-proof construction. The flexible wingtips anchor the earbuds securely for high-intensity exercise while remaining comfortable for extended everyday wear. Apple H1 chip provides the same seamless Apple ecosystem integration found in AirPods Pro, including on-demand Adaptive EQ and one-tap pairing. Active Noise Cancelling creates a focused environment for gym sessions, while Transparency mode keeps you aware of traffic and coaches during outdoor training. IPX4 rated for sweat and water resistance. Three listening modes — ANC, Transparency, and off — are accessible via the on-ear controls. Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking creates an immersive listening experience for music, movies, and games. Six hours per charge with an additional 21 from the compact charging case.

name: Open Fit
description: Shokz OpenFit earbuds break from convention with an open-ear design that sits comfortably in front of the ear canal without insertion, allowing natural ambient sound to pass through freely. This revolutionary approach eliminates ear fatigue entirely, making them the ideal choice for runners and cyclists who need to hear traffic and their environment while enjoying music. The directional audio technology focuses sound toward your ear while minimising leakage to those around you. The 18mm driver is optimised to produce impressively full sound despite the open design, with satisfying bass delivered through controlled vibration. IP54 rated for dust and splash resistance. The lightweight, wrap-around ear hook provides a secure fit during vigorous exercise without pressure or occlusion. Seven hours of battery life per charge, 28 hours total from the case. Safe listening that doesn't compromise on enjoyment.

name: K371
description: AKG K371 closed-back studio headphones deliver reference-accurate sound tuned to the AKG Target Curve developed through years of psychoacoustic research. The 50mm varimotion transducers with a two-layer titanium-coated polymer diaphragm provide exceptional detail retrieval, low distortion, and a natural tonal balance that makes mixing and mastering decisions reliable and accurate. The closed-back design provides excellent isolation for recording and tracking, preventing bleed into microphones. Three interchangeable cable options — coiled, straight long, and straight short — cover every studio scenario. Memory foam ear cushions wrapped in professional-grade leatherette provide superior comfort and consistent acoustic coupling during long sessions. The collapsible, rotating ear cups fold flat for transport and storage. The K371 has rapidly become the preferred reference monitor for project studios and professional engineers seeking accurate, uncoloured reproduction at an accessible price point.

name: Buds FE
description: Samsung Galaxy Buds FE brings Samsung's premium audio ecosystem to an accessible price point without cutting essential corners. The large 12mm driver produces Samsung's characteristic energetic sound signature with powerful bass and clear treble, backed by Active Noise Cancellation that provides genuine noise reduction for commutes and study sessions. The three-wing tip system creates a secure in-ear fit that stays put during exercise, while the three silicone ear tip sizes ensure comfortable acoustic sealing. Voice Pickup Unit with two microphones ensures calls are clear and natural. Samsung Galaxy ecosystem features including Auto Switch between Galaxy devices and automatic integration with Samsung Health are fully supported. Six hours of music playback per charge, with 21 hours total from the compact case. A USB-C charging case with fast charge capability delivers an hour of playback from just five minutes of charging.

name: Urbanite XL
description: Sennheiser Urbanite XL brings the German audio giant's famed sound engineering to an urban lifestyle headphone that performs as well as it looks. The large 50mm drivers produce Sennheiser's characteristically detailed midrange alongside a rich, satisfying bass response tailored for modern music genres including hip-hop, electronic, and R&B. The steel-reinforced headband and swivelling stainless steel ear cup joints are engineered to survive the rigours of daily urban life. Premium synthetic leather ear cushions provide excellent passive noise isolation on busy commutes. The tangle-resistant flat cable includes an inline microphone and remote for hands-free calling. Available in a range of urban-inspired colour combinations that reflect the youthful energy of Sennheiser's audio culture. At this price point, the Urbanite XL offers Sennheiser driver quality and build craftsmanship that competes with headphones at twice the price.

name: QC20
description: Bose QuietComfort 20 wired earphones bring Bose's legendary noise cancellation into a compact in-ear form factor powered by an inline battery module. The Bose Active EQ and TriPort acoustic structures produce the company's signature full, rich sound regardless of volume level. Aware Mode passes through environmental sound instantly — press the button on the control module to hear your surroundings without removing the earphones. The StayHear+ Sport tips in three sizes lock securely in the outer ear for active use while maintaining a comfortable fit during long flights. The inline battery module provides up to 16 hours of ANC operation on a single charge and continues to play audio passively when depleted. Three-button iOS or Android-compatible remote handles music playback and calls. For frequent flyers seeking reliable wired noise cancellation, the QC20 remains an enduring classic.

name: Virtuoso RGB Wireless XT
description: Corsair Virtuoso RGB Wireless XT combines studio-grade audio with gaming performance and wireless versatility that covers every platform. The premium 50mm high-density neodymium speaker drivers deliver Hi-Res certified audio with a frequency response extending to 40kHz, capturing subtle musical nuances that standard gaming headsets ignore. Broadcast-quality detachable microphone with -40dBV sensitivity ensures crisp, natural voice clarity during raids, scrims, and streaming sessions. RGB lighting on each ear cup is fully programmable via iCUE software. Multi-platform design uses 2.4GHz wireless for PC via USB dongle, Bluetooth for PS5 and mobile devices simultaneously, or 3.5mm analogue for Switch and Xbox. Ultrasoft microfibre cushioned ear pads in aerospace-grade aluminium cups provide professional comfort for extended sessions. Twenty hours of battery life. iCUE integration enables system-wide RGB synchronisation and deep audio customisation.

name: Zellus Pro
description: Cleer Zellus Pro earbuds deliver unexpected performance from a lesser-known brand that has been quietly winning over audiophiles with its engineering pedigree. The 10mm graphene-composite driver produces an exceptionally clean, transparent sound with natural bass decay and sparkling high-frequency extension. Adaptive Hybrid ANC uses feed-forward and feed-back microphones to achieve noise reduction that rivals premium offerings from industry giants. Cleer's proprietary Sound ID personalises audio to your hearing profile using a proprietary audiometric test built into the companion app. IPX5 water resistance ensures durability for sport and outdoor use. Multipoint connection across two devices with Bluetooth 5.3. An impressive 11-hour battery life per charge, with 44 hours total from the wireless charging case. Cleer Zellus Pro is the insider's choice for listeners who prioritise audio quality and value in equal measure.

name: HD 450BT
description: Sennheiser HD 450BT proves that German acoustic engineering excellence is accessible to every budget. The advanced Sennheiser transducers and bass optimisation circuitry produce the rich, accurate sound that defines the Sennheiser sound signature at a price that doesn't require saving up. Active Noise Cancellation effectively reduces environmental noise for more focused listening during commutes and work sessions. The soft, replaceable leatherette ear cushions seal around the ear comfortably, providing additional passive isolation that enhances the ANC performance. Intuitive side-mounted controls handle volume, playback, and voice assistant activation. Foldable, compact design with a sturdy carrying pouch makes travel hassle-free. Thirty-hour battery life means a full week of daily commuting on one charge, and a quick charge feature restores several hours of playback in minutes. Sennheiser quality and engineering at a genuinely accessible price.

name: WI-1000XM2
description: Sony WI-1000XM2 neckband-style earphones offer a unique combination of premium Sony noise cancellation and the secure, lightweight comfort of a around-the-neck design that suits professional environments. The industry-leading noise cancellation with Personal NC Optimiser adapts to individual ear shape and wearing conditions, producing consistent, reliable isolation on any flight or commute. Dynamic normaliser minimises sudden volume differences between tracks, and Adaptive Sound Control automatically adjusts ambient sound settings based on your activity. The 9mm HD driver with liquid crystal polymer diaphragm delivers exceptional transient response and wide frequency extension for lifelike reproduction of vocals and instruments. Up to 10 hours battery life per charge with high-res wireless audio via LDAC. The soft, textured neckband is flexible and lightweight, disappearing comfortably behind the neck during extended wear.

name: Momentum Sport
description: Sennheiser Momentum Sport earbuds are engineered for athletes who refuse to compromise on audio quality during training. Built-in optical heart rate monitoring eliminates the need for a separate fitness tracker during workouts, streaming real-time biometric data to supported fitness apps. IP54-rated dust and water resistance provides protection from sweat, rain, and splashing without compromise. The precision 7mm Sennheiser transducers deliver energetic, motivational sound calibrated specifically for exercise, with elevated bass energy that drives performance. Adaptive ANC allows you to control how much of your environment you hear, critical for safety during road running. A three-microphone system ensures clear call quality during active use. Six hours per charge with 18 hours from the wireless charging case. The ergonomic sport design with multiple ear tip and fin options creates a secure, custom fit for every ear anatomy.

name: Soundcore Liberty Air 2 Pro
description: Anker Soundcore Liberty Air 2 Pro delivers premium noise cancellation at a price that makes flagship earbuds seem wasteful. The PureNote 11mm driver with carbon nanotube composite diaphragm reproduces detailed, natural sound with a frequency response extending to 40kHz for Hi-Res certification. Three levels of HearID-personalised ANC adapts to your unique ear shape for maximum noise reduction tailored specifically to your anatomy. Transparency mode lets in natural ambient sound when you need situational awareness. The six-microphone system with AI noise reduction algorithm isolates your voice from background noise during calls. Seven hours of listening time per charge, with 35 hours total from the wireless charging case that supports Qi wireless charging. The Soundcore app includes an advanced 22-band parametric EQ and hearing health monitoring. At this price, Liberty Air 2 Pro is genuinely difficult to beat.

name: Tune 230NC TWS
description: JBL Tune 230NC TWS brings JBL's signature Pure Bass Sound and active noise cancellation to the most budget-friendly truly wireless earbud in its lineup. Despite the entry-level price, Active Noise Cancellation provides meaningful noise reduction for commutes and light office environments. The 6mm JBL drivers deliver the lively, bass-forward sound that JBL listeners expect, with enough energy to keep your commute entertaining. Ambient Aware mode lets in essential environmental sounds when needed for safety. A comfortable, lightweight in-ear design in a compact stick form factor sits naturally in the ear. Eight hours per charge with 32 hours total from the charging case makes battery life competitive with earbuds at much higher prices. Auto Play/Pause detects when earbuds are inserted or removed and pauses playback accordingly. Speed Charge provides an hour of playback from just 10 minutes of charging. Perfect for first-time TWS buyers.

name: WH-XB910N
description: Sony WH-XB910N extra bass headphones deliver a powerful, immersive low-frequency experience for listeners who love feeling music as much as hearing it. The specially tuned 40mm drivers are engineered to reproduce extended, powerful bass with physical presence while maintaining Sony's characteristic midrange clarity and high-frequency detail. The EXTRA BASS processor adds deep, resonant low end that transforms bass-heavy genres into a visceral, exciting experience. Industry-leading noise cancellation with Precise Voice Pickup Technology uses five microphones for exceptional call quality. Multipoint connection allows simultaneous pairing to two Bluetooth devices. Soft synthetic leather ear cushions with thick memory foam padding provide excellent comfort and passive isolation. Thirty-hour battery life with quick charge functionality. The neck-friendly folding design and carrying pouch make this an excellent travel companion for bass enthusiasts.

name: Elite 7 Pro
description: Jabra Elite 7 Pro earbuds are precision-engineered for professionals who demand best-in-class call performance alongside excellent music quality. MultiSensor Voice technology combines three microphones with a bone conduction sensor that detects jaw movement, enabling the algorithm to distinguish your voice from all other sounds with remarkable accuracy. Jabra's MultiPoint audio handles two simultaneous Bluetooth connections, allowing you to move seamlessly between phone calls and laptop meetings without manual device switching. Adjustable ANC and HearThrough give you complete control over your acoustic environment. The in-ear fit with SmartFit technology provides a secure, comfortable seal that stays in place all day. IPX5 rated for sweat and splash resistance. Up to 9 hours per bud, 35 total from the compact case. Compatible with all major UC platforms including Teams, Zoom, and Google Meet for professional-grade conference calling.

name: Studio Buds+
description: Beats Studio Buds+ delivers powerful ANC and immersive spatial audio in a completely stem-free design that fits naturally in the ear. The custom acoustic platform with three-microphone system produces Active Noise Cancelling two times more powerful than the original Studio Buds, blocking out urban noise, open offices, and flight cabin sounds. Transparency mode with ultra-low distortion lets in the surrounding world with crystal clarity. Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking maps sound to a fixed point in space, making music and movies sound completely three-dimensional. Compatible with both Apple and Android ecosystems, providing seamless device switching. The vent port design prevents pressure buildup for comfortable all-day wear. Up to 9 hours listening time per charge with 36 total from the pocket-sized charging case. IPX4 sweat and water resistance. Available in bold, expressive colour options.

name: Astro A50 Gen 5
description: Logitech ASTRO A50 Gen 5 is the premium wireless gaming headset that defines the category with its intelligent base station and uncompromising audio platform. LIGHTSPEED wireless technology delivers the fastest, most stable 2.4GHz connection available in a gaming headset, with zero perceptible latency that wired connections can't beat. The 40mm custom drivers produce powerful, spatially accurate sound for both competitive and single-player gaming. ASTRO Audio V2 tuning provides precisely calibrated frequency response for accurate positional audio, giving you an edge in competitive titles. The magnetic charging base station charges and displays your headset when not in use, integrating seamlessly into any gaming setup. Dolby Audio and DTS Headphone:X 2.0 provide two distinct spatial audio options. MixAmp technology enables precise game/voice balance control. The premium build with replaceable ear cushions and headband is engineered for years of use.

name: QuietControl 30
description: Bose QuietControl 30 wireless neckband earphones give you unprecented control over your noise cancellation environment. Unlike standard ANC earphones that offer only on/off options, the QuietControl 30 lets you dial in precisely how much noise you want blocked — choose complete isolation for deep focus or open yourself up to full awareness of your environment. Bose's proprietary acoustic design produces the warm, natural sound signature the company has refined over decades of research. The neckband design distributes weight comfortably around the neck, keeping earphones securely positioned without ear hooks or tips that cause fatigue. The ultra-soft ear tips are designed for all-day comfort. Bluetooth wireless with NFC pairing provides hassle-free connectivity. Ten hours of battery life via USB charging. Inline microphone and remote provide complete call and music control. The definitive neckband option for professionals who need audio flexibility.

name: TrueSound A3i
description: Edifier TrueSound A3i earbuds deliver remarkable performance at a price point that makes premium features accessible to every listener. The 12mm composite dynamic driver with carbon nanotube coating produces Edifier's signature warm, balanced sound with satisfying bass extension and smooth, fatigue-free high frequencies. Active Noise Cancellation with a dedicated feedback microphone provides effective noise reduction for urban commutes and open offices. Transparency mode using a six-microphone array captures ambient sound naturally for safe outdoor use. Bluetooth 5.2 with multipoint connection handles two simultaneous devices. Wireless charging via the case eliminates the need for cables. Eight hours of listening time per charge with 32 hours from the compact wireless charging case. Touch controls on each earbud are intuitive and customisable via the app. IPX5 sweat and water resistance provides workout durability. An outstanding value proposition from an audio brand with decades of speaker-making expertise.

name: WH-1000XM4
description: Sony WH-1000XM4 remains one of the finest headphones ever made, combining exceptional noise cancellation with audiophile-grade sound at a price that has become more attractive since the launch of its successor. Dual Noise Sensor technology captures noise across a wider range of frequencies, while the QN1 chip processes it for industry-leading cancellation performance. LDAC wireless codec transmits three times more data than standard Bluetooth for wireless Hi-Res audio. Speak-to-Chat and Quick Attention modes let you interact with the world naturally without removing the headphones. Multipoint connection pairs to two devices simultaneously. The 30-hour battery life and fast charging make it the ultimate travel companion. Comfortable synthetic leather ear cushions and a pressure-reducing headband make extended wear effortless. Still the reference standard for a good reason, the XM4 continues to impress with its combination of features, comfort, and sound.

name: Koss Porta Pro
description: Koss Porta Pro is a genuine audio legend that has been produced unchanged since 1984, beloved by audiophiles for its remarkable open-air sound that defies its modest price. The massive 60mm drivers — extraordinary for an on-ear headphone — produce a spacious, room-filling soundstage with warm, musical bass and smooth, detailed mids. The Koss Porta Pro's comfort zone temporal pressure system provides light, secure clamping that disappears during extended listening sessions. The lightweight folding design made this the original truly portable audiophile headphone before the category existed. The lifetime warranty Koss offers means your purchase is protected forever, making these exceptional long-term value. A cult following of dedicated listeners regularly compares its open-back presentation favourably to headphones costing hundreds more. For nostalgic listeners, commuters, and audiophiles seeking affordable open-air listening, the Porta Pro remains irreplaceable.

name: SoundSport Free
description: Bose SoundSport Free wireless earbuds bring Bose's legendary audio quality to active lifestyles with a secure, comfortable design engineered for movement. StayHear+ Sport tips anchor firmly in the outer ear without pressure, providing a naturally secure fit that handles running, lifting, and training without shifting. Bose's proprietary acoustic design delivers powerful, clear sound that cuts through exercise noise and keeps your motivation high. IPX4 sweat and weather resistance provides reliable protection during outdoor and gym workouts. Bluetooth connectivity with simple one-button pairing. Up to five hours of battery life per charge, with an additional 10 hours from the pocket-sized charging case. Each earbud charges independently in the case, so you can continue using one while the other charges. The Bose Connect app enables customisation and access to additional features. Reliable, musical, and built for activity.

name: Headset 700
description: Bose Noise Cancelling Headphones 700 represent the flagship of Bose's personal audio lineup, featuring 11 levels of adjustable noise cancellation that can be precisely tuned through the Bose Music app. The sculptural stainless steel and glass-filled nylon frame creates a headphone that is as distinctive to look at as it is to hear. The eight-microphone system uses four for noise cancellation and four for voice pickup, isolating your voice from background noise on calls better than any competing headphone. Bose AR augmented reality audio and Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa integration are built directly into the headphone. Touchpad controls on the ear cup are fluid and responsive. The 20-hour battery life handles transatlantic flights, while quick charge provides 3.5 hours from a 15-minute charge. A premium travel case with magnetic closure completes the luxury package.

name: Buds Live
description: Samsung Galaxy Buds Live features a distinctive, jewel-like bean-shaped design that sits naturally in the outer ear for a comfortable open-fit experience that never creates pressure or occlusion. The massive 12mm speaker driver within this compact enclosure produces powerful, room-filling sound with Samsung's AKG-tuned acoustic signature. Active Noise Cancellation, while lighter than in-ear designs due to the open architecture, effectively reduces low-frequency noise like traffic and air conditioning for a more pleasant environment. Three microphones ensure clear call quality in most environments. The seamless Samsung Galaxy ecosystem integration includes Auto Switch between connected devices and Galaxy Wearable app customisation. Up to 6 hours of listening time per charge, with 21 hours from the compact charging case. IPX2 splash resistance provides basic protection against light perspiration. For those who find traditional in-ear tips uncomfortable, the Buds Live offer a genuinely pleasant alternative.

name: SE-C5TW
description: Pioneer SE-C5TW truly wireless earbuds deliver reliable performance with Pioneer's decades of audio expertise distilled into an accessible package. The 10mm carbon nanotube composite driver produces Pioneer's characteristic clean, detailed sound with natural tonal balance and satisfying bass energy. The ergonomic design with secure ear tips provides a stable, comfortable fit during physical activity. IPX5 water resistance ensures protection from heavy sweat and rain exposure during outdoor workouts. Ambient Sound mode maintains awareness of your environment during outdoor activities. Bluetooth 5.0 ensures stable, low-latency connectivity. Nine hours of playback per charge, with an additional 27 hours from the included charging case, for a total of 36 hours of wireless listening. Intuitive single-button controls on each earbud manage playback, volume, and calls without reaching for your phone. A solid, dependable daily driver from a brand with genuine audio heritage.

name: Ananda
description: HiFiMAN Ananda is a reference-grade planar magnetic headphone that provides an unobstructed window into the soul of recordings. The 74mm planar magnetic driver with NEO Supernano diaphragm — just two micrometres thick — moves with extraordinary precision, reproducing the most complex musical passages with effortless control. The open-back honeycomb ear cup design provides perfect acoustic symmetry, eliminating standing waves and creating a vast, three-dimensional soundstage. Extraordinary detail retrieval, lightning-fast transient response, and vanishingly low distortion define the Ananda's performance envelope. The ultra-low impedance and high sensitivity make these surprisingly easy to drive from portable sources, though a quality amplifier reveals their full potential. Plush velour ear cushions and an adjustable headband system provide comfortable, fatigue-free long-term listening. For audiophiles upgrading to planar magnetic technology, the Ananda represents a profound step in resolution and musicality.

name: Move
description: Epos Move on-ear headphones bring professional-grade call quality and audio into an affordable wireless package designed for the modern remote worker. Precise 32mm neodymium drivers deliver clear, balanced audio for both music and calls, ensuring accurate reproduction of voices and conference audio. The side-sealing ear cushion design provides passive isolation from ambient office and home environment noise without the weight and bulk of over-ear headphones. Intuitive aluminium anodised control dial manages volume, playback, and call functions with satisfying precision. The flexible microphone boom arm folds out of sight during music listening and deploys quickly for calls. Twenty-five hours of battery life means a full working week on a single charge. The foldable design with storage bag makes commuting with the Move effortless. Pairs perfectly with Epos's software for UC integration with Teams, Zoom, and Cisco. A professional-quality headset at an approachable price.

name: WF-C700N
description: Sony WF-C700N delivers Sony's sophisticated noise cancellation technology in a compact, lightweight earbud designed for everyday use. The 8.4mm driver unit draws on Sony's experience from the premium WF-1000XM5 to reproduce detailed, natural sound with satisfying bass extension and clear vocal presence. The Digital Sound Enhancement Engine upscales compressed streaming audio to near Hi-Res quality, revealing details that standard wireless audio would lose. Precise Voice Pickup Technology with three microphones provides reliable call clarity in urban environments. The compact case with an ergonomic single-handed opening design fits in any pocket. Up to 7.5 hours listening time per charge, with 23 hours from the case. IPX4 rated for sweat resistance during exercise. Voice Assistant integration and quick access controls via the Sony Headphones Connect app allow personalised customisation. An excellent all-rounder for listeners who want reliable Sony performance at a mid-range price.

name: Steel Series Arctis 7P+
description: SteelSeries Arctis 7P+ is the definitive wireless gaming headset for PlayStation and PC, bringing together the iconic Arctis comfort platform with 30 hours of 2.4GHz wireless battery life. The custom-tuned 40mm neodymium driver delivers the balanced, accurate sound that Arctis headsets are renowned for in esports circles. Lossless 2.4GHz wireless with simultaneous Bluetooth support means you can take a call on your phone while gaming on PS5, with audio mixing in your ear. The ClearCast bidirectional microphone uses a background noise-cancelling algorithm trusted by esports professionals for interference-free voice chat. The ski goggle suspension headband distributes weight across the entire top of the head, making hours of play feel comfortable. Retractable microphone is fully ClearCast certified. Magnetic ear cups accept luxury replacement cushion upgrades. Multi-platform via USB-C and USB-A dongle.

name: E6 Pro
description: Epos GTW 270 Hybrid earbuds bridge the gap between consumer convenience and professional audio performance. The dual-connection design supports both USB-C dongle low-latency wireless for PC gaming and standard Bluetooth 5.1 for mobile use, making these earbuds genuinely versatile across all your devices. The 10mm neodymium driver delivers clear, detailed audio with a focus on midrange presence that benefits both voice communication and music. Hybrid ANC filters office noise and open-plan chatter for focused working sessions, while Transparency mode keeps you connected to your environment when needed. Epos's reputation for professional communication equipment is reflected in a microphone that produces remarkably clear voice pickup for conference calls and remote meetings. Seven hours per charge with an additional 21 from the compact USB-C charging case. IPX4 rated for light moisture resistance during commutes and workouts.

name: JLab Epic Air Sport ANC Gen 2
description: JLab Epic Air Sport ANC Gen 2 earbuds redefine value in the sport earbud category with an extraordinary 15-hour battery life and genuine active noise cancellation. The 10mm graphene driver delivers powerful, bass-forward sound with JLab's signature energetic tuning that pushes performance during training. Active Noise Cancellation effectively filters gym noise and traffic for focused workouts, while Be Aware mode keeps you safe during outdoor activities. The cloud foam and gel flex ear tips come in three sizes and provide the customisable fit needed for secure wearing during high-impact exercise. IPX5 water resistance handles sweat, rain, and splash without issue. The remarkable 15 hours per charge delivers an entire day of use without reaching for the case, with an additional 40 hours from the included charging case. A three-band EQ preset system built into the earbuds allows quick sound customisation. Exceptional value for serious athletes.

name: OpenRun Pro
description: Shokz OpenRun Pro bone conduction headphones revolutionise sport audio by transmitting sound directly to your inner ear through vibrations on your cheekbones, leaving your ear canals completely unobstructed. This revolutionary technology means you can hear your music clearly while maintaining full awareness of traffic, cyclists, and environmental sounds — a critical safety advantage for road runners and cyclists. The premium titanium frame is virtually unbreakable and weighs just 29 grams, disappearing on your face during even the most intense training sessions. Ninth-generation bone conduction technology from Shokz dramatically improves bass response compared to previous generations, producing surprisingly full-bodied sound for the technology. IP55 dust and water resistance handles heavy sweat and outdoor conditions. Ten hours of battery life via magnetic charging cable. The wrap-around design stays secure without ear hooks or tips during any activity.

name: MT202
description: Beyerdynamic MMX 300 Pro headset brings German acoustic engineering excellence into a professional headset platform trusted by broadcasters, podcasters, and streamers worldwide. The 40mm Tesla driver technology, adapted from Beyerdynamic's reference studio headphones, delivers the precise, analytical sound that professional audio users rely on for mixing and monitoring. The detachable boom microphone with cardioid polar pattern and shock mount delivers broadcast-quality voice capture with natural, uncoloured reproduction. An inline amplifier module provides volume control and microphone monitoring. The replaceable ear cushions in premium velour provide excellent breathability and comfort during extended recording sessions. The robust, folding metal construction is engineered for professional daily use. Hand-built in Heilbronn, Germany, the Beyerdynamic MMX 300 Pro carries the brand's legendary quality craftsmanship into the professional communication headset category.

name: DT 990 Pro
description: Beyerdynamic DT 990 Pro is an open-back studio reference headphone beloved by mixing engineers, mastering professionals, and audiophiles for its remarkable analytical clarity and expansive soundstage. The 45mm dynamic transducer with Beyerdynamic's Tesla-adjacent driver technology produces a characteristically bright, detailed sound with exceptional high-frequency extension that reveals subtle reverb tails, breath noise, and ambience in recordings. The open-back design creates a natural, speaker-like presentation with precise stereo imaging and zero bass trapping. At 250 ohms, the DT 990 Pro benefits significantly from a dedicated headphone amplifier that controls the low end with authority. The self-adjusting headband and replaceable, velour-covered ear cushions provide comfortable studio wear during extended mixing sessions. Made in Germany with replaceable cables and cushions, the DT 990 Pro is an investment that lasts decades.

name: Buds 3 Pro
description: OnePlus Buds 3 Pro earbuds bring flagship performance to a mid-range price with their premium feature set built around high-fidelity audio. The 11mm micro-planar tweeter combined with a 10mm dynamic woofer in a dual-driver configuration delivers Hi-Res Audio with extraordinary separation between highs and lows. Adaptive Noise Cancellation 2.0 with three operational modes responds intelligently to your environment, providing up to 50dB noise reduction for the most demanding environments. Smart Adaptive Transparency passes through ambient sound processed to remove sudden loud impulses, preventing startling while maintaining awareness. OnePlus's LHDC 5.0 codec delivers lossless wireless audio quality when connected to a compatible source device. Ten hours of playback per charge with IP55 protection against dust and water. The distinctive transparent case design has become an iconic signature element of the OnePlus audio aesthetic.

name: Truthear HOLA
description: Truthear HOLA is a remarkable wired in-ear monitor that delivers audiophile-grade sound tuning for less than $20, making reference-quality listening accessible to everyone. The single 10mm dynamic driver with liquid crystal polymer diaphragm is tuned to the Harman Target curve — the psychoacoustically derived standard for neutral, accurate sound reproduction. The resulting frequency response delivers balanced, natural sound with clean bass extension, accurate midrange, and smooth treble that avoids harshness. The transparent blue resin shell is beautifully crafted with visible internal components. The 0.78mm two-pin removable cable system allows upgrades and replacement. Three pairs of silicone ear tips in different sizes ensure a proper seal for maximum bass extension and isolation. For the budget-conscious audiophile seeking a neutral reference earphone, the Truthear HOLA has quickly become a legendary recommendation in the IEM community.

name: Nova 3
description: Audio-Technica QuietPoint ATH-ANC900BT brings Japanese acoustic precision and reliability to a feature-rich wireless headphone at an accessible price. The 40mm driver system is engineered for the natural, musical sound profile Audio-Technica has perfected over decades in professional studio monitor design. Hybrid Digital Active Noise Cancelling with four microphones produces effective isolation from transportation and environmental noise during commutes. The folding design with premium carrying case is travel-optimised for frequent commuters. An impressive 50-hour battery life means weeks of daily commuting between charges. Dual connection in wired 3.5mm and wireless Bluetooth 5.0 modes provides flexibility. Touch sensors on the ear cup provide intuitive control over music, calls, and ANC settings. The foldable, low-profile design stores compactly without a dedicated case. Audio-Technica's heritage in professional audio is evident in the balanced, refined tuning of every driver.

name: CX Plus True Wireless
description: Sennheiser CX Plus True Wireless earbuds deliver Sennheiser's renowned acoustic engineering at a genuinely accessible price point. The 7mm Sennheiser driver is precisely tuned for clean, balanced reproduction with natural bass and clear vocal presence. Active Noise Cancellation effectively reduces ambient noise for focused listening during commutes and work, while Transparent Hearing mode provides natural ambient sound awareness. The companion Smart Control app unlocks a customisable equalizer and detailed ANC controls. Bluetooth 5.2 ensures a stable connection and low-latency audio. Touch controls on each earbud are accurately mapped for intuitive operation without looking. Wear detection pauses music when an earbud is removed. Nine hours of listening time per charge with an additional 18 from the compact charging case. IPX4 rated for sweat and light rain. Sennheiser acoustic quality at a price that makes upgrading from entry-level truly wireless options an easy decision.

name: Headphones 3
description: Poly Voyager Focus 2 UC headphones represent the communication-first headset approach refined by decades of professional telecommunications expertise. The three-microphone boom arm with WindSmart technology isolates your voice with precision in wind, office noise, and café environments. Dynamic ANC cancels background noise so you can focus during calls and deep work sessions. The premium softtouch leatherette ear cushions and steel frame provide excellent durability and comfort for all-day professional wear. Smart sensors detect when you put the headset on and off, auto-answering calls and pausing media accordingly. The vibration alert system notifies you of incoming calls even in noisy environments where audio alerts would be missed. Eighteen hours of talk time on a single charge. UC software integration provides call control, status indicators, and configuration through Plantronics Hub. A reliable, professional-grade choice for hybrid workers.

name: MW75
description: Master & Dynamic MW75 combines sculptural industrial design with exceptional audio performance in a premium wireless headphone that makes a statement about refined taste. Hand-assembled with aircraft-grade aluminium, stainless steel, and genuine lambskin leather ear cushions, the MW75 is as much a luxury object as it is a listening instrument. The proprietary 40mm beryllium-coated driver delivers a warm, musical sound with extraordinary dynamic range and low-distortion bass response. Active Noise Cancellation with adjustable intensity creates a cocoon of silence for focused work and travel. LDAC and aptX Adaptive codec support ensures Hi-Res wireless audio from compatible sources. The premium carrying case in vegan leather completes the luxury unboxing experience. Thirty-hour battery life with ANC enabled. For listeners who demand the best and want their audio equipment to reflect their aesthetic values, the MW75 is uncompromising.

name: ROG Delta S Wireless
description: ASUS ROG Delta S Wireless gaming headset combines ASUS's premium PC hardware expertise with a 50-hour battery life that makes cord management a forgotten concern. The quad-DAC ESS Sabre ESS9601 amplifier and dual-chamber acoustic design delivers audiophile-grade audio processing typically found in dedicated audio equipment. The 50mm Essence driver with ROG exclusive AI Beamforming technology delivers precise positional audio that competitors have genuinely struggled to match. AI noise-cancelling microphone with machine learning voice isolation produces clear, natural vocal pickup even in the loudest gaming environments. RGB lighting and Aura Sync integration coordinate with other ROG peripherals. Three simultaneous wireless connections via 2.4GHz dongle and Bluetooth 5.0 provide ultimate device flexibility. The MQA Hi-Res certification means it reproduces studio master quality audio. Padded leatherette ear cushions provide comfort across long gaming sessions.

name: M50xBT2
description: Audio-Technica ATH-M50xBT2 is the wireless evolution of the studio industry's most beloved monitoring headphone, preserving the iconic sound profile in a wireless format. The 45mm large-aperture drivers with rare earth magnets and copper-clad aluminium wire voice coils reproduce the M50x's legendary detailed, accurate sound with wide dynamic range across the full frequency spectrum. Fifty-hour battery life via Bluetooth 5.0 with aptX and AAC codec support ensures Hi-Res quality wireless audio. The ninety-degree swivelling ear cups and folding design maintain the original M50's portability for studio professionals who work on the move. An on-board three-button remote provides full control without reaching for your device. Wired 3.5mm and 2.5mm inputs are available when wireless isn't appropriate. The M50xBT2 retains the M50's industry-standard positioning as the most recommended gateway headphone for music producers and recording engineers.

name: Wyze Headphones
description: Wyze Headphones deliver genuinely impressive ANC performance at a price that challenges the value proposition of headphones three times the cost. Active Noise Cancellation effectively reduces broadband environmental noise, providing welcome relief from office HVAC noise, traffic, and urban ambience. The 40mm drivers are tuned for a balanced, musical response with satisfying bass extension and clear vocals. The soft leatherette ear cups and padded headband provide comfortable wear during extended work sessions. Bluetooth 5.0 with multi-device pairing supports seamless device switching. The 40-hour battery life is exceptional at any price point, and the USB-C charging cable provides quick top-ups. An inline 3.5mm cable included for passive wired use. With a companion app for EQ and ANC controls and surprisingly effective build quality, Wyze Headphones represent one of the most remarkable value propositions in consumer audio — proof that premium features can be democratised.

name: FreeBuds SE 2
description: Huawei FreeBuds SE 2 earbuds provide a complete, well-rounded truly wireless experience at an entry-level price that makes premium audio accessible for everyone. The 10mm dynamic driver with carbon crystal diaphragm produces clean, vibrant sound with natural bass extension and clear vocal reproduction. The semi-open fit design sits comfortably in the outer ear without insertion, providing a light, pressure-free wearing experience ideal for extended commutes. IPX4 water resistance handles light rain and perspiration during exercise. Bluetooth 5.3 with quick pairing ensures an instant, stable connection. The automatic ear detection pauses playback when an earbud is removed and resumes when replaced. Nine hours of playback per charge, with 30 hours from the compact charging case that supports wireless Qi charging. A budget-friendly option with refined aesthetics and reliable performance that delivers more than its price suggests.

name: Momentum True Wireless 4
description: Sennheiser Momentum True Wireless 4 represents the fourth generation of Sennheiser's flagship truly wireless earbuds, elevating every aspect of its predecessor. The redesigned 7mm transducer system delivers reference-grade audio tuning that satisfies the most demanding audiophiles, with extraordinary imaging, natural tonal balance, and control through complex musical passages. Adaptive ANC with four microphones provides seamless, unobtrusive noise management that intelligently adapts without requiring manual adjustment. Sound Personalisation with Audiometry in the Smart Control app maps a custom EQ response to your unique hearing profile. Transparent Hearing uses natural-sounding processing to pass ambient sound without the artificial quality of lesser implementations. The premium titanium-nitride coated driver produces vanishingly low distortion at any listening level. 7.5 hours per charge with 30 hours from the wireless charging case. The refined design and materials quality befit the Sennheiser Momentum name.

name: E50BT
description: JBL Everest 50BT on-ear Bluetooth headphones bring JBL's powerful, dynamic sound into a comfortable, lightweight on-ear design suitable for all-day wear. The 40mm JBL Pure Bass drivers deliver the characteristically powerful, impactful sound that has made JBL globally renowned, with deep bass extension and energetic presentation that enhances any genre. Sweat-proof construction protects against perspiration during light exercise and commuting. The plush ear cushions provide excellent comfort without the weight of over-ear designs, while still providing meaningful passive isolation from environmental noise. Smart controls with three-button remote handle calls, music, and voice assistant activation. Twenty hours of wireless playback makes a full week of daily commuting achievable on one charge. Folding design for compact storage and travel. ShareMe technology allows audio sharing between two pairs of JBL headphones simultaneously. A dependable everyday headphone with the JBL signature everyone knows.

name: Elite 45h
description: Jabra Elite 45h delivers an outstanding 50-hour battery life in a comfortable, foldable on-ear headphone at an approachable price. The 40mm speaker drivers are precision-tuned by Jabra's audio engineers for balanced, clear sound reproduction that suits both music and voice calls with equal capability. MySound audio personalisation tailors the sound to your individual hearing profile through a guided hearing test, creating a custom EQ response that maximises your audio experience. Two microphone call technology provides clear voice pickup for calls and voice assistant commands. The compact, foldable design makes this one of the most portable wireless headphones available. MySound and EQ settings are managed through the Jabra Sound+ companion app. Voice Assistant integration with both Google and Alexa is supported. For commuters and remote workers who need reliable all-day headphones with class-leading battery life, the Elite 45h represents outstanding value from a brand with deep telecommunications heritage.

name: MW65
description: Master & Dynamic MW65 Active Noise-Cancelling Wireless Headphones set the standard for luxury headphone design with materials and construction that define the premium tier. The lightweight, premium aluminium frame is finished by hand and paired with ear cushions in genuine lambskin leather for an indulgent, plush fit. The 40mm beryllium driver — typically found only in exotic, far more expensive transducers — delivers extraordinary transparency, dynamics, and warmth. Active Noise Cancellation with two user-adjustable levels provides effective isolation without the slightly artificial quality of some competing implementations. Twenty-four hours of wireless battery life in a headphone this premium is genuinely impressive. The companion Master & Dynamic app offers EQ control and ANC adjustment. The collapsible design with a premium zip case makes the MW65 as travel-ready as it is beautiful. A rare combination of design, materials, and audio performance that rewards the investment.

name: Vibe 200TWS
description: JBL Vibe 200TWS brings JBL's authentic Pure Bass Sound to the most affordable truly wireless earbuds in the lineup, making high-quality wireless audio available to everyone. The 8mm JBL drivers deliver the energetic, bass-forward sound characteristic of JBL at a price that makes these accessible for a first foray into truly wireless audio. The stick-style design sits naturally in the ear canal with a lightweight, comfortable fit that won't cause fatigue during daily use. Simple one-button controls on each earbud manage music and calls without confusion. Stable Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity with a reliable range for everyday use. Seven hours of playback per charge, with an impressive 28 hours from the compact charging case. Speed charge delivers an hour of playback from just 15 minutes of charging, essential for busy days when you forget to top up overnight. Voice Assistant integration and auto-connect functionality round out the feature set.

name: Elite 85t
description: Jabra Elite 85t is engineered for the professional who needs great music and great calls in a premium true wireless package. The 12mm speakers deliver rich, full-bodied audio with a naturalness and warmth that makes extended listening sessions genuinely pleasurable. Advanced Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation with adjustable intensity gives you precise control over how much of the outside world enters your audio environment. Six-microphone technology ensures voice calls are clear and natural in any environment, while the semi-open fit allows more natural air pressure distribution for greater comfort than sealed designs. MySound personalisation through the Jabra Sound+ app creates a custom hearing profile. Multipoint connection manages two simultaneous Bluetooth devices. Five and a half hours per charge with 25 hours total from the wireless charging case. Compatible with voice assistants and all major UC platforms. The Elite 85t is the professional's daily driver.

name: Z50 ANC
description: Moondrop Z50 ANC brings the Chinese audiophile brand's celebrated tuning philosophy to an accessible wireless headphone that delivers exceptional value. The 40mm composite dynamic driver applies Moondrop's proprietary IEF Neutral target curve — a scientifically derived standard for natural, accurate sound reproduction — to a headphone platform. Active Noise Cancellation with a four-microphone hybrid architecture provides effective broadband noise reduction that genuinely competes with premium brands. The plush memory foam ear cushions with protein leather covers provide comfortable long-term wear. Bluetooth 5.3 with LDAC and AAC codec support ensures high-quality wireless audio. An exceptional 60-hour battery life with ANC enabled outlasts most competing headphones. The fold-flat design collapses compactly for travel. A companion app provides EQ presets and listening mode controls. For audio-conscious listeners seeking an accurate, reference-tuned headphone without breaking the budget, the Moondrop Z50 is a compelling choice.

name: Studio Monitor 3
description: Beats Studio Pro is the definitive Beats headphone for audio professionals and enthusiasts who demand studio-quality monitoring capabilities alongside premium wireless performance. A USB-C digital audio connection bypasses the Bluetooth codec entirely for bit-perfect audio streaming from compatible sources, making these genuinely suitable for critical listening and professional monitoring tasks. Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking places audio precisely around you in three-dimensional space. Active Noise Cancelling uses Beats' most advanced implementation, creating a focused acoustic environment for creative work. LDAC wireless codec provides lossless-quality streaming over Bluetooth when wired isn't available. The 40-hour battery life is exceptional for a headphone with active circuitry. The custom-tuned 35mm drivers balance the Beats signature bass energy with reference-quality clarity in the midrange and high-frequency range. A genuine evolution of the Beats formula toward professional standards.

name: H9i
description: Bang & Olufsen Beoplay H9i is a masterwork of Scandinavian industrial design that places acoustic luxury alongside visual excellence. Handcrafted lambskin leather ear cushions and aluminium ear cup hinges reflect the Danish design philosophy of materials chosen for sensory pleasure as much as function. The 40mm driver delivers B&O's signature warm, musical sound with remarkable three-dimensionality and harmonic richness that draws listeners into recordings. Active Noise Cancellation with transparency mode provides effective sound management for travel and focused listening.
